---
id: list-apps
title: "Get a list of apps"
description: "Gives back a paginated list of apps your user has access to for the workspace specified based on given filters."
sidebar_label: "Get a list of apps"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

info_path: en/release-management-api/apps/api-reference/release-management-api

---

  method={"get"}
  path={"/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Gives back a paginated list of apps your user has access to for the workspace specified based on given filters.
